questions.question: Which core/digital banking concept best matches: centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time?

centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time
questions.explanation: Core Banking System refers to: centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time.

questions.question: 'Core Banking System' belongs mainly to which core banking area?
questions.explanation: Core Banking System is mainly part of Core Banking Fundamentals.

questions.explanation: The requirement directly points to Core Banking System.
